name: monotone order signal
claim_or_reason: slot_delta_mod15 and fiber_delta_mod60 recover the Euclidean order once the four groups are already known.

name: inside/outside reading
claim_or_reason: outside boundary span rises while inside fiber residual falls, giving a bounded local completion grammar.

name: transition microcell layer
claim_or_reason: C_delta_mod15 exposes 12 form-pure two-row transition microcells.

name: count-level grid hint
claim_or_reason: 24 rows can be visually read as 2 x 3 x 4 at the count level, but native sheet and channel coordinates were not found.

name: delta partition failure
claim_or_reason: native delta fields alone do not reconstruct the four six-row forms.

name: flat cut failure
claim_or_reason: 2,951 flat row-field cuts did not derive the four-form partition.

name: incidence cut failure
claim_or_reason: 40 reciprocal or shared-endpoint incidence cuts did not derive the four-form partition.

name: refinement failure
claim_or_reason: six C-endpoint incidence components did not refine into the four forms in the tested family.

name: microcell aggregation failure
claim_or_reason: 20,910 tested microcell quotient aggregations did not recover the four forms.

name: grid coordinate failure
claim_or_reason: no tested native row field supplied the two-sheet or three-channel coordinate.

name: source construction audit
claim_or_reason: the missing grouping law may live upstream in the source construction rather than in row fields.

name: manuscript boundary section
claim_or_reason: the project needs a human-readable boundary before more searches.

name: shuffle and ablation tests
claim_or_reason: the monotone and microcell signals should be tested against label shuffles and source perturbations.
